731 GG0170I3_WLK_10_FEET_END_CD GG0170I3_WLK_10_FEET_END_CD GG0170I3 Once Standing, Walk 10 Feet End Indicator CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability once standing, to walk at least 10 feet in a room, corridor, or similar space at the end of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 01=Dependent
 02=Substantial/maximal assistance
